.nav-file-title-content::before.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
.nav-file-title-content::before.font-family: "??", "??", "??", ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

.status-bar.background: rgb(245, 245, 245) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(252, 252, 252) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

a.external-link[data-tooltip-position=\".background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) linear-gradient(rgb(19, 196, 163) 0%, rgb(19, 196, 163) 100%) repeat-x scroll 0px 100% / 5px 5px padding-box border-box

a.internal-link.is-unresolved[data-href=.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) linear-gradient(rgb(139, 128, 249) 0%, rgb(139, 128, 249) 100%) repeat-x scroll 0px 100% / 5px 5px padding-box border-box

a.internal-link[data-href=\"callouts\"][.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) linear-gradient(rgb(139, 128, 249) 0%, rgb(139, 128, 249) 100%) repeat-x scroll 0px 100% / 5px 5px padding-box border-box

blockquote.background: rgb(235, 235, 235) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.--blur-background: color-mix(in srgb, #FCFCFC 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#FCFCFC, color-mix(in srgb, #FCFCFC 65%, transparent))
body.--folder-filter: invert(55%) sepia(90%) saturate(407%) hue-rotate(119deg) brightness(94%) contrast(91%)
body.--raised-background: color-mix(in srgb, #FCFCFC 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#FCFCFC, color-mix(in srgb, #FCFCFC 65%, transparent))
body.background: rgb(252, 252, 252) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(252, 252, 252) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

code.background: rgb(235, 235, 235) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(252, 252, 252) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(245, 245, 245) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(245, 245, 245) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(252, 252, 252) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(245, 245, 245) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: rgb(19, 196, 163) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(235, 235, 235) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(235, 235, 235) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
